headline: Solar activity moderate; skip zones expected on higher frequencies during daylight hours
highlights: BBC World Service: 6195 kHz, 1200-1400 UTC - English news and analysis
Voice of America: 9455 kHz, 1500-1700 UTC - Americas service with strong signal
Radio France Internationale: 11605 kHz, 1400-1600 UTC - European coverage stable
Deutsche Welle: 6100 kHz, 0600-0800 UTC - German and English programming
changes: 11910 kHz service relocated to 11920 kHz effective immediately due to interference mitigation
15240 kHz evening window extended 30 minutes to 2130 UTC to accommodate listener demand
propagation_note: F layer ionization favorable for 7-9 MHz band; recommend 41m band for reliable evening reception. D layer absorption minimal. Best DX window 1800-2200 UTC on higher frequencies.
